thought.text: I need to fix the ANTLR grammar - the Comment rule has an issue with the ->skip command:

action.old_str:
// Comments - skip them
Comment
    :   '/*' .*? '*/'
        -> skip
    |   '//' ~[\r\n]*
        -> skip
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "new_str": "// Comments - skip them
Comment
    :   '/*' .*? '*/'
        -> skip
    ;

CommentLine
    :   '//' ~[\r\n]*
        -> skip
    ;", "old_str": "// Comments - skip them
Comment
    :   '/*' .*? '*/'
        -> skip
    |   '//' ~[\r\n]*
        -> skip
    ;", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4"}

summary:
file_editor: {"command": "str_replace", "new_str": "// Comments - skip them
Comment
    :   '/*' .*? '*/'
        -> skip
    ;

CommentLine
    :   '//' ~[\r\n]*
        -> skip
    ;", "old_str": "// Comments - skip them
Comment
    :   '/*' .*? '*/'
        -> skip
    |   '//' ~[\r\n]*
        -> skip
    ;", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4"}
